DataResidency.description: Data residency configuration for the workspace. WorkspaceGeo is immutable after creation.

WorkspaceGeo.description: Geographic region for workspace data storage. Immutable after creation. Defaults to 'us' if omitted.

Geographic region for workspace data storage. Immutable after creation. Defaults to 'us' if omitted.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

DefaultInferenceGeo.description: Default inference geo applied when requests omit the parameter. Defaults to 'global' if omitted. Must be a member of AllowedInferenceGeos unless AllowedInferenceGeos is omitted.
DefaultInferenceGeo.markdownDescription:
Default inference geo applied when requests omit the parameter. Defaults to 'global' if omitted. Must be a member of AllowedInferenceGeos unless AllowedInferenceGeos is omitted.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

AllowedInferenceGeos.description: Permitted inference geo values. Omit to allow all geos (the service default of 'unrestricted'); otherwise list specific geos.
